Analyze Text.description: Summarize, classify, or otherwise analyze a block of text.

Summarize Text (Legacy).description: Condense a block of text into a short summary.

Classify Text (Legacy).description: Assign a piece of text to one of the categories you supply.

Analyze Text Sentiment (Legacy).description: Score the overall sentiment of a block of text.

Extract Structured Data.description: Pull structured fields out of unstructured text using a JSON schema.

Write an Email.description: Draft an email body from a prompt, ready for a follow-up send step.

Send Prompt.description: Send an open-ended prompt to OpenAI and capture the reply.

Analyze Image Content With Vision (Legac.description: Send an image and a question about it to a vision-capable model.

Conversation (Legacy).description: Send a multi-turn chat to OpenAI, optionally preserving prior turns.

Conversation.description: Send a chat turn using the Responses API, with optional tool use such as web search.
